title: The Red Bus Ride
synopsis: Two friends take a famous red double-decker bus through the busy streets of London.
sentences: Owen and Sam wanted to see London from the top of a red double-decker bus.
They climbed the narrow stairs and found seats by the front window upstairs.
From there, the city looked wide and full of movement.
Black taxis moved beside the bus, and people hurried along the pavement below.
The bus passed shops, parks, and old stone buildings.
At every stop, new passengers came in with bags, umbrellas, and quiet conversations.
Sam pointed at a street musician playing violin near a crossing.
Owen laughed when the bus turned and both of them leaned to one side.
Soon they crossed a bridge and saw the river shining under the afternoon sun.
A woman behind them said this was still the best way to watch the city.
By the end of the ride, Owen and Sam felt as if they had seen a hundred little stories.
They got off smiling and agreed that the bus itself had been part of the adventure.
